title: Rojak
description: A random collection of miscellaneous textures and tweaks, supports Aether, Twilight Forest, etc.
body:
![rojak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6746cb7c79d7d328876a479df051592d6596c30.png)
[![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9914ae0928c827b971f0c124e1991c52a58b1438.jpeg)](https://discord.gg/mfjZyHrWKp)
Rojak is a _miscellaneous_ resource pack featuring texture tweaks for vanilla Minecraft and various mods, mainly built around my personal preferences.

Requires [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) for certain features.

Feel free to use this pack in your modpack, just make sure you comply with the license.

![h0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c3ec46cbe9c7107dce238aa4152c42ee462970d.jpeg)
